rows.evidenceQuote: I predict the formula breaks when the case changes, because I need to explain the relation in my own words.

learner_resistance.description: Learner can repeat the sequence but has not turned it into an owned proof move.
learner_resistance.evidence: So I just repeat master, servant, recognition, formula? This still feels like parroting.
